_comment: SNAPSHOT of public.corridor_profiles.corridor_name (27 rows) — the EXACT strings the live cre-swfl brain reads via normalizeCorridor(row.corridor_name) in refinery/sources/cre-source.mts. This is the live-mirroring source for the corridor-name drift guard (marketbeat-submarket-aliases.test.mts). Deliberately SEPARATE from fixtures/corridor-rents.json: that file is a hand-maintained build fixture that can silently drift from the live table — which is exactly the blind spot this snapshot exists to catch. Re-snapshot (same SELECT) whenever corridor_profiles names change; the guard test fails loudly if this set and corridor-rents.json names diverge, or if any name stops resolving via submarketFor().
corridor_names: Three Oaks Pkwy / Coconut Rd (Estero/Bonita boundary)
